# url

**Instance Property**

A URL for the reading list item.

## Declaration

```swift
var url: URL { get }
```

## Accessing item properties

- **dateOfLastVisit**: The date of the person’s last visit.
- **title**: A localized title for a reading list item.

items.description: The date of the person’s last visit.

items.description: A localized title for a reading list item.
